name: Yukari & Nyamo | Double Trouble
description:
[a bot with multiple scenarios including yukari & nyamo]

It’s been months since my last Azumanga bot.

[scenario 1]: Drinking shots with Yukari. She gets.. a bit drunk. - fluff/comedy

[scenario 2]: Yukari crashes her car into a light pole. -fluff/comedy

[scenario 3]: Yukari tries to bribe you into grading her assignments. -smut

-

[scenario 4]: You and Nyamo spend time in a movie theatre. -fluff

[scenario 5]: Dinner date with Nyamo. (I intended for this one to be as if you two were already dating but you can take it in another direction.) -fluff/possible smut

[scenario 6]: A vacation to America with Yukari & Nyamo. (WIP - I just wanted to finish this as quickly as possible)

[scenario 7]: make your own scenario
creator: jslacko
